geopolitics_summary: Hormuz closure and Iran tensions elevate crude and refined product risk; EU sanctions Russia's 21st package; jet fuel crisis managed via workarounds.

themes.headline: Hormuz closure triggers global competition for energy safe-haven status
themes.why_it_matters: Strait of Hormuz closure (Feb 28) constrains global crude supply; EU exposed to crude and refined product price spikes. Higher input costs pressure power generation economics and thermal coal displacement.

themes.headline: Trump threatens Iran escalation as nuclear deal negotiations stall
themes.why_it_matters: Escalating US-Iran tensions risk further crude supply disruptions and refined product scarcity. Higher crude and diesel/jet fuel prices increase marginal cost of thermal generation; upside risk to EU power baseload.

themes.headline: EU freezes Russian oil price cap in 21st sanctions package
themes.why_it_matters: Price cap freeze limits EU access to discounted Russian crude; tightens global crude balances and increases alternative sourcing costs. Marginal cost of thermal generation may rise; neutral to modest bearish pressure on power if LNG arb widens.

themes.headline: Europe fends off jet fuel crisis using workarounds; summer risk remains
themes.why_it_matters: Jet fuel availability constraints easing via operational adjustments, reducing near-term refinery pressure. Lower refined product volatility reduces thermal gen marginal cost inflation; modest downside to power in weeks ahead.

themes.headline: EU targets €5bn North Africa solar investment for power supply
themes.why_it_matters: Large-scale Sahara solar projects aim to displace EU baseload and reduce power demand in medium term. Long-term bearish for thermal spreads and EUA prices if deployment accelerates; structural headwind to Cal+1 power curves.

watchlist: Iran nuclear deal collapse risk; monitor crude and product futures for supply shock tail
EU sanctions package 21 implementation timeline; Russian crude rerouting impacts LNG arb
Hormuz closure duration and shipping reroute costs; refinery margin recovery baseline
North Africa solar project financing and grid connection timelines; 2027–2030 capacity additions
